examples: It might be translated to coziness in English, but it is more than that.
The warm coziness of my own bed after I return home from a long business trip.
It was said coffee was bitter, but my earliest memory embraced it with some coziness.
Arnault griped about the all-Swiss coziness of the Richemont deal, but he got little sympathy.
In this case the coziness goes beyond the office: These guys share pens at work and towels at home.
